name: EdwBhiClaimsDrLoad

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_stage1 AS (SELECT DISTINCT clmf.CLM_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.CLM_F clmf, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.CLM_LN_F clmln, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.CLM_F2 clmf2, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.GRP_D grpd, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_D mbr, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.CLS_D cls, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PROD_D prodd WHERE clmf.GRP_SK = grpd.GRP_SK AND clmf.CLS_SK = cls.CLS_SK AND clmf.CLM_SK = clmln.CLM_SK AND clmf.CLM_SK = clmf2.CLM_SK AND clmf.MBR_SK = mbr.MBR_SK AND clmf.PROD_SK = prodd.PROD_SK AND clmf.SRC_SYS_CD = 'FACETS' AND clmf.CLM_HOST_IN = 'N' AND clmf.CLM_SUBTYP_CD IN ('IP','OP','PR') AND clmf.CLM_STTUS_CD = 'A02' AND clmf.CLM_TYP_CD = 'MED' AND clmf.PROD_SH_NM IN ('PCB','PC','BCARE','BLUE-ACCESS','BLUE-SELECT','BLUESELECT+','HP','BMADVH','BMADVP') AND clmf.GRP_ID NOT IN ('10023000','10024000') AND grpd.PRNT_GRP_ID <> '650600000' AND cls.CLS_ID <> 'MHIP' AND clmf.CLM_SVC_STRT_YR_MO_SK >= '201001' AND clmf.CLM_PD_YR_MO_SK BETWEEN '@{pipeline().parameters.BeginYrMo}' AND '@{pipeline().parameters.PaidEndYrMo}') SELECT CLM_SK FROM cte_stage1
